meaning: Single Instrution Multi Data,单指令多数据
examples: This is known as SIMD (single instruction, multiple data), or data parallelism.
A new address generator of the embeded SIMD coprocessor is introduced in this paper.
A whole implementation framework of code selection which is support of SIMD has been advanced.
The biggest speed boost comes when software is rewritten to take advantage of the Streaming SIMD Extensions.
Intel has added 70 new processor instructions, called Streaming SIMD Extensions.
